title: Atlassian Backup & Restore for Cloud is here (Premium and Enterprise)
description: Protect your data with Atlassian Backup & Restore, an add-on available for purchase (Premium and Enterprise; conditions apply). Simplify backups, cut recovery time, and keep teams moving when issues strike. Discover more about Atlassian Backup and Restore. Anyone already in Open Beta can continue enjoying this feature without purchase until mid-April, 2026. Atlassian Backup and Restore can be purchased by reaching out to your Account Executive, Account Manager, or Atlassian Support directly. Ter
